assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 3 contains '## Repository Registry'. Lines 5-6 contain the table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and separator '|---|---|---|---|'. No data rows follow. Line 8 explicitly states: 'No repositories are configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 10 contains '## Jira Configuration'. Lines 12-14 contain the 3 fields: 'Project key: MYPROJ', 'Cloud ID: abc123', 'Feature issue type ID: 10001'. No Git Pull Request or GitHub Issue custom fields are present, as expected.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 16 contains '## Code Intelligence'. Line 18 states: 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 6: '**Serena tools**: None discovered. No tools matching the `mcp__serena*` pattern were found among the available MCP tools.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 7: '**Atlassian tools**: None discovered. No tools matching the `mcp__atlassian*` pattern were found among the available MCP tools. Jira configuration fields were provided via manual entry by the user.'

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 11: 'The user was prompted about continuing without code intelligence (no Serena instances available) and chose to continue.'
